name: AfdxGetPacketData
title: AfdxGetPacketData
syntax: long AfdxGetPacketData( long packet, long offset, long length, byte buffer[] );
description: This function copies the packet content (including protocol header and payload) to a local buffer.

parameters.name: packet
parameters.description: Handle of the message that has been created with AfdxInitPacket or from within a callback.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: This is the offset from the beginning of the Ethernet frame. If this is 0, data is copied starting at byte 0 frame (destination MAC address).

parameters.name: length
parameters.description: This is the number of bytes to be copied from Ethernet frame to the specified buffer.

parameters.name: buffer
parameters.description: Buffer in which the requested data are copied. Make sure that the size of the buffer is at least length bytes.

return:
Number of copied data bytes.
With AfdxGetLastError you can check if the function has been processed successfully.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
